inputs.label: Mass of Substance (g)

inputs.label: Molar Mass (g/mol)
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass of the substance (e.g., water = 18.015 g/mol)

businessContext_i18n.de: Molmasse der Substanz (z. B. Wasser = 18,015 g/mol)

inputs.label: Molecules per Unit Cell
inputs.businessContext: Number of molecules per unit cell in a crystal (optional, default 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of molecules per unit cell in a crystal (optional, default 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kristalde birim hücre başına molekül sayısı (isteğe bağlı, varsayılan 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Moleküle pro Elementarzelle in einem Kristall (optional, Standard 1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de molécules par maille élémentaire dans un cristal (optionnel, défaut 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de moléculas por celda unitaria en un cristal (opcional, predeterminado 1)

inputs.label: Unit Cell Volume (nm³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of a unit cell in cubic nanometers (optional, default 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of a unit cell in cubic nanometers (optional, default 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim hücrenin nanometreküp cinsinden hacmi (isteğe bağlı, varsayılan 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen einer Elementarzelle in Kubiknanometern (optional, Standard 1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume d'une maille élémentaire en nanomètres cubes (optionnel, défaut 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de una celda unitaria en nanómetros cúbicos (opcional, predeterminado 1)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique de la substance (optionnel, défaut 1)
